title: IELTS Writing Practice Test 1
description: Writing task for formal essay on technology

writingTasks.prompt: The chart below shows the results of a survey about people's main reasons for using the internet. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
Some people think that technology is making us more isolated and lonely, while others believe it brings us closer together. Discuss both views and give your own opinion.
